c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C1: LiveMode raise in Initialize; status_fields strings PAUSED / BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C2: engine-truth run_id; Initialize date cross-check; window ceiling check
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C3: all universal + futures-specific counters tracked; unique-day-set pattern
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C4: per-market RTH windows; eod_cancel == rth_close per market; LIMIT discipline
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C5: known_contract_rolls + known_expirations populated; blackout + LIMIT pre-close; unsupported-MOC detection
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C6: schema_id == s7_d1_cross_asset_donchian_in_sample_diagnostic.v1; cagr from engine; win_rate literal when n<100
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C7: closed enum {FAIL_SAFETY, INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE, READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST}; min_closed_trades=100; K-gates run in parallel
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C8: park-on-weak-performance rule; revival requires fresh s8 candidate_record_id; live-block permanent

citation_block:
# Inherits Phase 2 safety contracts (C1-C8) from:
#   docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.md  (sha 1812f485...8981)
#   docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.json (sha 695a9fb6...4a32)
# Template source candidate (parked, not money-proven):
#   s2-62fc753afc01f22c (NKE Options Wheel Tier-1 v6.1)
# Template reuse notice: NKE strategy logic NOT inherited; only safety contracts.
# Inherits Tier-N spec seal: 72602305ef8d678195f9ab91a6d4cb8e7a473ee1a641cf9e8f91b8d4e31134c3
# Inherits plan-lock seal: 0f8e9fe6bc4f50e4f17c41611dbd01b7f9df3047ed448a3e9dffe7533210572d
# Inherits s7 selection plan seal: 8d8851bc365ef9a6eb7883b24f272d8462cb4bda9c9e725aa46415e1434f9eac

fail_closed_when: LiveMode exception is missing, conditionally bypassed, or weakened
Any status string is reduced to anything other than PAUSED / BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES
Any broker / exchange / wallet / API-key adapter appears in imports
required_evidence: main.py Initialize block contains: if self.LiveMode: raise Exception('LIVE_PATH_DETECTED: s7-d1-cross-asset-donchian-no-filter-nq-gc-zn-cl is paper-only forever; refuse to run in live mode.')
Local engine equivalent: if os.environ.get('LIVE_MODE') == '1' or any --live flag: raise the same exception.
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.trading_status == 'PAUSED'
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.live_status == 'BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES'
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.backtest_diagnostic_only == True
No file under external_research_hunter/s7_d1_cross_asset_donchian_runner_harness/** imports broker/exchange adapters
C1_LiveMode_refusal.what_it_means_here: The s7 D1 runner (QC LEAN or local engine) MUST refuse to run in live mode. Both runtime paths are diagnostic-only. The runner does not import or instantiate any broker / exchange / Kraken / Binance / Alpaca adapter under any code path.

fail_closed_when: run_id hash inputs include any CONFIG-mutable date instead of engine date
Initialize cross-check is missing or bypassed
Engine EndDate > plan_lock_window_ceiling
report_seal_sha256 is missing OR is not byte-reproducible via external recompute

required_config_fields_for_future_runner.plan_doc_sha256: <computed at BUILD time as canonical_seal of this phase2_plan.json>

C2_provenance_contract.required_output_seal: report_seal_sha256 via LESSON_HUNTER_004 canonical roundtrip (sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':'), ensure_ascii=False, default=str EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method)
C2_provenance_contract.what_it_means_here: Every diagnostic output of the future runner is tagged with a deterministic, engine-truth run_id derived from the sealed inheritance chain + engine StartDate/EndDate. The Initialize cross-check raises if CONFIG dates diverge from engine dates. The window ceiling check raises if engine EndDate exceeds the plan-lock window ceiling.

fail_closed_when: Any hard safety counter > 0 at run end without an authoritative disposition
Any counter is mutated without a corresponding _forbidden_action_attempts or _skip_log entry
Per-minute increment used where per-day was intended

futures_specific_counters.expiry_or_roll_fills_outside_rth_count: int; DISCLOSURE-ONLY. Engine-driven contract rollover or expiry-related fills that fire outside RTH are not safety violations. Logged but not penalized.
futures_specific_counters.n_calculation_drift_detected_count: int; counts cases where the Wilder ATR(20) for a unit was recomputed from a different bar than the trigger bar. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.non_rth_fill_warning_count: int; CME RTH-only filter is at bar-derivation; a fill outside RTH is a safety violation. Tracked via tag classification. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.pyramid_state_machine_violation_count: int; counts cases where unit-count > 4 OR unit-spacing != 0.5N OR N recomputed mid-trade. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.rollover_violation_count: int; counts positions held across an expiration boundary the runner did NOT explicitly roll. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.unsupported_order_type_detected_count: int; for CME futures via QC, MarketOrder/LimitOrder/MarketOnOpen are supported; MarketOnClose typically supported for futures. Counter tracks any rejected order_type observed. Top-priority FAIL_SAFETY trigger if > 0.

C3_safety_counters.unique_day_counter_pattern_required: Use a set-of-date-objects pattern (matches NKE v6.1 lesson). Example: `if today not in self._roll_dates_seen: self._roll_skip_count += 1; self._roll_dates_seen.add(today)`. Per-minute-bar increments are forbidden where per-day is intended.

universal_counters_required.all_safety_warnings_zero: bool; True iff all hard safety counters are 0
universal_counters_required.forbidden_action_attempts_detected: list; must be empty for READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST

C3_safety_counters.what_it_means_here: Futures trend-following on NQ/GC/ZN/CL has different counter applicability than NKE's equity-options class. RTH-only filtering is enforced at bar-derivation time (see §session_rules), so 'extended-hours opening fills' as an equity-options-specific category does not apply directly. Roll dates are tracked as a separate disclosure counter, not as safety violations.

C4_rth_execution_discipline.boundary_alignment_rule: rth_safe_window_close == eod_cancel_time per market; misalignment is forbidden.
fail_closed_when: eod_cancel_time > rth_safe_window_close for any market
MarketOnClose order submitted for an opening unit
Non-RTH bars enter the Donchian channel computation
Wider RTH safe window than the asset's regular session is used
C4_rth_execution_discipline.limit_order_discipline: Opening orders MUST be LimitOrder OR market-on-next-open per spec entry_timing (ONO). MarketOnClose is forbidden for opens. Closing orders may be Market if the runner is operating at the session-close bar (matches spec exit_trigger fire-at-close + ONO exit).
required_checks_per_market_per_bar: Exchange.ExchangeOpen (or local-engine equivalent) == True for that market
C4_rth_execution_discipline.required_eod_cleanup: Schedule.On at each market's eod_cancel_time daily. For every unfilled pending order on that market: ticket.Cancel(tag='s7_d1_eod_unfilled_cancel'); record_skip('order_unfilled_eod_canceled'); pop from _pending_orders.
C4_rth_execution_discipline.what_it_means_here: Each of the 4 markets has its own RTH window (already locked in the Tier-N spec session_rules). Per-market eod_cancel_time MUST equal each market's rth_safe_window_close. Donchian uses daily bars derived from RTH session ONLY; non-RTH bars do not enter the channel. Entries are LIMIT or ONO (open-on-next-bar) at the configured entry_timing; no MarketOnClose on opens.

fail_closed_when: Position held across an expiration the runner did not explicitly roll or pre-close
MarketOnClose submitted for a position close (must be LIMIT)
ex_date / roll_date hardcoded outside CONFIG
Blackout check skipped when known_events list is empty (must run the check as a no-op)
operator_responsibilities: Maintain known_contract_rolls and known_expirations current for 2013-2022 in-sample window
Source from CME group official calendar + Databento `definition` schema for each contract
Document the source and date of the event audit in the candidate's BUILD-time run preamble

required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_contract_rolls: list[dict]; each dict: {market, roll_date_et, prior_contract, next_contract, stitch_method, modeled_cost_dollar}. Pre-populated from Databento `continuous` series metadata.
required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_economic_event_blackouts: list[dict]; OPTIONAL but recommended: NFP, FOMC, CPI release dates. If present, runner skips new entries on those dates (per-market basis).
required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_expirations: list[dict]; each dict: {market, expiry_date_et, contract_code, delivery_type: 'cash' | 'physical', notes}. Used to refuse a candidate whose tenor spans expiry.

required_logic.expiry_blackout_at_ondata: If today is within [-expiry_blackout_days_before, 0] of a known expiry_date_et, refuse new opens on that market; for CL physical-delivery, attempt LIMIT pre-close before the expiry blackout.
required_logic.pre_close_via_limit_only: LIMIT order at (ask + expiry_pre_close_aggressive_ticks * tick_size) for sell-side closes. Tag must contain '_close_pre_expiry' or '_close_pre_roll' suffix.
required_logic.roll_blackout_at_ondata: If today is within [-roll_blackout_days_before, +roll_blackout_days_after] of a known roll_date, refuse new opens on that market; allow LIMIT pre-close on any open position; counter via date-set membership.
required_logic.unsupported_moc_detection_in_onordereven: Detect MarketOnClose submissions; increment unsupported_order_type_detected_count regardless of order status.

C5_event_risk_contract.what_it_means_here: Futures do not have splits, special dividends, or spinoffs. The equivalent 'scheduled events' are: (1) contract rolls (front-month switch), (2) physical-delivery expirations (CL especially), (3) major economic events that produce CME limit-up/limit-down (e.g. NFP, FOMC, CPI). Operator responsibility is to maintain a known_events list and the runner must implement blackout + LIMIT pre-close.

fail_closed_when: schema_id silently bumped
win_rate emitted as a number when closed_trades_portfolio < verdict_min_closed_trades
cagr_pct computed from CONFIG dates
report_seal_sha256 missing or not byte-reproducible
performance_summary_required_fields_for_: cagr_pct (computed from engine StartDate/EndDate, NOT CONFIG)
required_top_level_fields_for_s7_d1: linked_plan_doc_sha256 (sha of this phase2_plan.json after seal)
linked_seals_at_init (dict with tier_spec_seal, plan_lock_seal, predecessor_seal, phase2_safety_template_md/json, all 16 parent shas)
safety_fix_attestations (dict of C1-C8 per-clause booleans + s6 cap-bugfix attestation)
scan_diagnostics (per-market bar counts, RTH coverage, NaN drops)
C6_diagnostic_output_schema.what_it_means_here: Every in-sample diagnostic emission must conform to the C6 universal schema. schema_id must end in .v1 and start with sparta.external_research_hunter.s7_d1_cross_asset_donchian_in_sample_diagnostic. performance_summary computes cagr_pct from engine StartDate/EndDate, NOT CONFIG. win_rate is emitted as the literal string 'NA_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE' when closed_trades_portfolio < verdict_min_closed_trades.

fail_closed_when: A new verdict outside the closed enum is silently introduced
READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is interpreted as live-ready in any downstream automation
Numeric win_rate emitted when n < threshold
C7_verdict_semantics.k_criteria_mapping_to_verdict_reasons: Per Tier-N spec rejection_gates K1..K12: even if VERDICT == READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST in the C7 enum, if K1/K2/K4/K6/K7/K8/K9/K10/K11/K12 fire, the candidate parks per Tier-N §rejection_gates. C7 enum and Tier-N K-gates run in parallel; the candidate proceeds to OOS authorization ONLY if BOTH (VERDICT == READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST) AND (no K fires) AND (Tier-N acceptance gates A1..A10 all pass).
C7_verdict_semantics.never_means_live_ready: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is a research label only; 6-gate live-block applies regardless.
verdict_precedence_high_to_low: non_rth_fill_warning_count > 0 OR stale_fill_warning_count > 0 OR rollover_violation_count > 0 OR pyramid_state_machine_violation_count > 0 OR n_calculation_drift_detected_count > 0 -> FAIL_SAFETY
else -> READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST (with K-criteria appended as caveats)
C7_verdict_semantics.what_it_means_here: Closed-enum verdicts: FAIL_SAFETY / INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST. Verdict precedence is universal. s7 D1 sets verdict_min_closed_trades = 100 (== K9 threshold). READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is exclusively a research label; the 6-gate live-block is permanent.

allowed_operational_statuses_for_s7_d1: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST (after a clean P6 in-sample run + P7 memo)
REJECT_FAST (K12 fires; DR2/DR3/DR5 on cost-stress matrix)
fail_closed_when: Auto-revival of a parked candidate
Modification of a parked s7 D1 record to claim better economics
Parking used as a soft path to live promotion (live-block is permanent)
Threshold loosening or parameter iteration after seeing in-sample results (optimization, forbidden)
permanent_attributes_unchanged_by_parkin: All advisory labels declared in Tier-N spec

transitions.revival: From any PARKED_*: requires a FRESH SEALED RESEARCH CYCLE under a NEW candidate_record_id (e.g. s8-*). Not a continuation of s7 D1. Old s7 D1 record stays intact and byte-stable.
transitions.to_OOS_AUTHORIZED: Operator authorization required. Authorizes a SEPARATE OOS run turn (not pre-authorized by this plan).
transitions.to_PARKED_*: Operator authorization required (P8 lifecycle transition turn). Writes a canonical parking report at reports/external_research_hunter/s7_d1_cross_asset_donchian_PARKING_REPORT.md. Algorithm source preserved verbatim under external_research_hunter/s7_d1_cross_asset_donchian_runner_harness/.

C8_candidate_lifecycle.weak_performance_rejection_rule: If s7 D1 shows: portfolio_sharpe_proxy_per_trade < 0 AND expectancy_per_trade_mnq_equivalent <= 0 AND pl_ratio < 0.5 AND closed_trades_portfolio >= verdict_min_closed_trades (100), operator MUST park as PARKED_SAFE_BUT_NOT_MONEY_PROVEN. Do NOT iterate parameters or re-run with adjusted thresholds. Any retry requires a fresh s8 candidate_record_id.
C8_candidate_lifecycle.what_it_means_here: Operational status transitions for s7-d1. Parking is permanent within this chain. Revival requires a fresh s8 candidate_record_id with a fresh sealed chain. Weak-performance rejection rule is binding: clearly negative economics on adequate sample = PARK, no iteration.

fail_closed_conditions_for_future_runner: Any C1 violation: LiveMode bypass / status string change / broker import
Any C2 violation: CONFIG/engine date divergence / window ceiling violation / seal recompute mismatch
Any C3 hard safety counter > 0 at run end
Any C4 violation: non-RTH bar in channel / MOC opens / eod_cancel misalignment
Any C5 violation: position held across expiry without explicit handling / MOC close on a brokerage that rejects it
Any C6 violation: schema_id bump / cagr from CONFIG / win_rate as number when n<100 / missing seal
Any C7 enum extension or live-ready interpretation
Any C8 weak-performance iteration / parking revival / threshold loosening
Any K1..K12 fire from Tier-N rejection_gates
Any sealed parent sha drift detected mid-run
Any obsidian-trade-logger mutation, review_queue mutation, strategy_lab promotion
Any QC API call from the local-engine code path or vice versa

phase2_safety_template_inheritance_attes.template_source_candidate: s2-62fc753afc01f22c (parked, not money-proven; safety contracts only inherited; NKE strategy logic NOT reused)

pre_flight_checklist_for_future_p6_in_sa: PF1: All 16 sealed parent shas match disk (canonical recompute for JSON parents; byte sha for Phase 2 template files)
PF2: Tier-N spec seal sha matches recorded (72602305...)
PF3: Plan-lock seal sha matches recorded (0f8e9fe6...)
PF4: This phase2_plan.json seal matches its embedded report_seal_sha256
PF5: All 4 Databento caches present and complete (NQ.c.0 already cached; GC, ZN, CL fetched by operator before this turn)
PF8: known_contract_rolls and known_expirations populated for 2013-2022 in-sample window
PF9: Deterministic run_id computed offline; distinct from all prior PHASE2-* run_ids
PF10: Smoke init in QC OR local engine produces expected algo_version + run_id banner without CONFIG_*_DATE_MISMATCH
seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':'), ensure_ascii=False, default=str) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method
what_future_p3_build_may_NOT_create: Any runner-side or guard-side network call
Any Databento key handling code that prints/logs/echoes the key
Any QC API stub that would execute at build-time module import
Any broker / exchange / wallet adapter import
Any signal-shaped output (e.g. live trade decisions, real-time alerts)
Any test that reads real market data (T1-T15 are synthetic-only)
Any file under obsidian-trade-logger/, local_secrets/, or any other repo
Any modification to review_queue.json, idea_memory, or Strategy Lab state

must_embed_in_main_py_module_constants.plan_doc_sha256: <computed at BUILD time as canonical_seal of this phase2_plan.json>
